# UiHost.IsServerSdkObligation method

Returns `true` when *concern* is a SERVER-SDK obligation under this extension (one of [`ServerSdkObligations`](./ServerSdkObligations.md)); returns `false` for any host-only concern (spec §26.9, R-26.9-d).

```csharp
public static bool IsServerSdkObligation(string concern)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| concern | A server obligation or host-only concern name. |

## Return Value

`true` when a server-SDK obligation.
